hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(/[.]env([.]|$)/.test(f)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'deny',permissionDecisionReason:'Blocked: .env files contain sensitive credentials and must not be edited by Claude.'}}));}})"
